common.emptyDesc: Once there's data to show, you'll see it in this space.

footer.tagline: Your personal AI fitness and nutrition coach. Smarter workouts, better meals, real results — all in one place.
footer.crafted: Crafted for athletes, students, and everyone in between.

home.heroDesc: AI-powered meal planning, custom workout generation, deep nutrition analysis, and recipes made from whatever you have in the fridge — one clean, focused app.
home.featuresDesc: Six AI-powered tools designed to keep you consistent — whether you're chasing PRs, dropping body fat, or just trying to feel good.
home.testimonialsDesc: FitAI isn't just an app — it's the coach thousands wish they had years ago.
home.ctaDesc: Join 250,000+ people using FitAI to build the body — and habits — they've always wanted.

workout.title: AI Workout Generator
workout.desc: Instantly build training plans matched to your goals, equipment, and schedule.

meal.title: Smart Meal Planner
meal.desc: Weekly meal plans tuned to your calories, macros, and dietary preferences.

recipe.title: AI Recipe Creator
recipe.desc: Turn any ingredients into a delicious, macro-balanced recipe in seconds.

nutrition.title: Nutrition Analysis
nutrition.desc: Break down any meal into calories, protein, carbs, fats, and micronutrients.

library.title: Exercise Library
library.desc: Hundreds of exercises with form cues, muscle targets, and swap suggestions.

progress.title: Progress & Insights
progress.desc: Track weight, workouts, and streaks with a beautiful, focused dashboard.

profile.title: Tell FitAI about you
profile.desc: Share your goals, current fitness level, dietary preferences, and available equipment.

plan.title: Get your AI plan
plan.desc: Instantly receive a personalized workout program and matching weekly meal plan.

progress.title: Train, eat, progress
progress.desc: Log workouts and meals, watch your streak grow, and let FitAI adapt as you level up.

sarah.name: Sarah K.
sarah.quote: The AI meal planner nails my macros for long-run days. I've never had this much energy in training.

marcus.name: Marcus D.
marcus.quote: I finally stuck to a workout plan for six months. FitAI actually adapts when life gets busy.

priya.name: Priya R.
priya.quote: Fast recipes from whatever's in my fridge — it's like having a nutritionist in my pocket.

diego.name: Diego M.
diego.quote: Lost 8kg without giving up my favorite foods. The AI made it feel effortless, not restrictive.

faq.a: Yes. Every workout, meal plan, and recipe is generated from your goals, level, dietary preferences, and available equipment — then adapted as you log progress.
No. FitAI creates programs for gym, home, bodyweight, or hybrid setups. Just tell us what you have.

faq.q: Can I follow a specific diet?
faq.a: Absolutely. Vegan, vegetarian, keto, Mediterranean, halal, gluten-free, and more are supported out of the box.
Yes — you can generate workouts, plan meals, and use the BMI calculator for free. Premium unlocks unlimited AI and advanced tracking.
Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We never sell it. Read our Privacy Policy for full details.

about.description: FitAI was born from a simple frustration: generic plans don't work. We built the coach we wished we had — one that listens, learns, and shows up every day.
